studies.company_provider: GET.ON Institut für Online Gesundheitstrainings GmbH
studies.risk_class: Risk Class I according to MDR
studies.duration_additional_info: Primary endpoint assessed at 8 weeks; follow-ups conducted at 6 and 12 months.
studies.additional_info_about_trial_arms: Intervention group received a 6-week online training program with guided self-help (weekly emails and optional SMS) and a 7th lesson 4 weeks after the final lesson. Control group received psychoeducational materials about depression and access to the online training after 12 months.
studies.collected_data: Primary outcome: Depressive symptoms (General Depression Scale, ADS). Secondary outcomes: Sociodemographic data, worry (PSWQ), activation (BA-DS), problem solving (Social Problem Solving Inventory), long-term blood sugar level (HbA1c), problem areas in diabetes (PAID), diabetes acceptance (AADQ), diabetes self-management (DSMQ), depression (HADS-D), therapy expectation (Pathev, intervention group only), negative effects of health training (INEP, intervention group only), attitude toward seeking professional help (ATSPHS), satisfaction with the program (ZUF-8, intervention group only), quality of life (EuroQol, SF-12), and direct/indirect costs (TiC-P). Data collected at baseline, 8 weeks, 6 months, and 12 months.

audit.study_title: Internet-based programme to treat depressive symptoms of patients with diabetes mellitus type 1 and type 2
audit.note: registry-only: outcome measures captured under collected_data; no reported results
